channel.title: q-bio.MN updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: q-bio.MN updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Duality in mass-action networks
item.description: arXiv:2603.08767v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Mass-action networks are special cases of chemical reaction networks. For these systems, we argue that conserved quantities are dual to internal cycles. We introduce maximal invariant polyhedral supports, and we conjecture that there is a duality relation between preclusters and maximal invariant polyhedral supports. Given the close relation between maximal invariant polyhedral supports and siphons, we also conjecture that siphons and preclusters are dual objects.
item.dc:creator: Alexandru Iosif
